app.name: Tisei
app.tagline: Learn languages with a pocket translator

common.offline: No internet connection — using cached data

auth.name: Name
auth.fill_all_fields: Please fill in all fields correctly (password ≥ 6 chars)
auth.name_invalid: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.password_weak: Password must be ≥8 chars with a letter and a number
auth.password_requirements: At least 8 characters, one letter and one number
auth.age_hint: Your age helps us personalize your learning
auth.email_hint: Used to log you in — we won't spam you
auth.forgot_password_hint: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.reset_code_sent_hint: If {} is registered, a reset code has been sent.
auth.code_invalid: Please enter the 6-digit code from the email
auth.password_reset_success_hint: You can now log in with your new password.
auth.guest_hint: Create an account to save your progress, streaks and achievements

errors.user_exists: An account with this email already exists
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired, please log in again
errors.invalid_code: The code is incorrect or has expired
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts, please try again later

home.title: Hi, {}!
home.games_subtitle: Word games on any topic you choose

lesson.tests_locked_hint: Review all flashcards first to unlock the tests.

listening.prompt: Listen and type the word you hear
listening.revealed_msg: Tap Skip to move to the next word.

mc.no_translations: This lesson has no translations to test against.

speaking.title: Speaking practice
speaking.tap_to_record: Tap the mic and pronounce the word
speaking.stage_fail: Not enough correct — try the speaking stage again

translator.title: Translator
translator.stt_unavailable: Speech recognition unavailable on this device
translator.offline_mode: Offline mode — uses on-device ML Kit. First use requires model download.
translator.offline_model_body: Offline translation requires downloading language models for: {}. Download now (~30 MB each)?
translator.offline_unsupported: This language pair is not supported for offline translation.

profile.title: Profile
profile.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

settings.title: Settings
settings.learning_reminders_subtitle: Tisei will gently remind you to return to words and lessons at the time you choose.
settings.reminder_permission_denied: Allow notifications in your device settings
settings.reminder_notification_title: Time for a short study session
settings.reminder_notification_body: 10 minutes of words today will help you keep the rhythm.

assessment.placement_cta: Take the placement test to set your level
assessment.level_up_cta: Ready to level up to {}? Take the test!
assessment.placement_intro_body: Answer a few vocabulary questions to find your starting point. The test takes about 5 minutes.
assessment.complete_more_topics: Complete {} more topic(s) to unlock the level-up test

character.title: Character
character.sub_lesson_completed: Lesson complete. Review a few words and move to the next step.
character.sub_test_passed: Your answers look solid. The next goal is already closer.
character.sub_test_failed: This is feedback, not failure. Review the words and try again.

games.title: Games
games.custom_topic_hint: Type any topic and AI will build the game around it — or skip for a default round.
games.level_any_hint: Mix words from beginner to advanced
games.level_my_hint: Words at your current CEFR level

word_match.title: Word Match
word_match.subtitle: Pair words with translations
word_match.rules: Tap a word in the left column, then its matching translation on the right. Correct pairs turn green and lock in. Mismatches reset — try to make zero mistakes!

word_scramble.title: Word Scramble
word_scramble.subtitle: Unscramble the letters
word_scramble.rules: You’ll see a translation and a pile of shuffled letters. Tap letters in the right order to spell the original word. Tap a placed letter to send it back. Earn one point per word.

sentence_builder.title: Sentence Builder
sentence_builder.subtitle: Arrange words into a sentence
sentence_builder.rules: Read the translation, then tap the shuffled words in the correct order to build the original sentence. Use the Check button when ready. Punctuation stays attached to the words.

hangman.title: Hangman
hangman.subtitle: Guess the word letter by letter
hangman.rules: Guess the hidden word one letter at a time. Each wrong letter draws another part of the gallows — you have 6 attempts. Use the hint shown above the word as a clue.
